title: The Supreme Court (Number of Judges) Act, 1956

provisions.title: Short title.
provisions.content: This act may be called the Supreme Court (Number of Judges) Act, 1956.

provisions.title: Maximum number of Supreme Court Judges other than Chief Justice.
provisions.content:
The maximum number of Judges of the Supreme Court, excluding the Chief Justice of India, shall be 1[thirty-three].

[Footnote] 1. Subs. by Act 37 of 2019, s. 2, for "thirty" (w.e.f. 09-08-2019).
